product: L-Acoustics 112XT (coaxial XT-series stage monitor / FOH enclosure; part of the legacy XT LINE with 115XT and 115XT HiQ)

electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 65 Hz - 18 kHz (±3 dB, FRONT preset); usable bandwidth 55 Hz - 18 kHz (-10 dB)
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Datasheet/marketing peak figure is 133 dB; the manual specification table lists continuous SPL of roughly 122-125 dB depending on preset, with peaks of 128-131 dB.
electroacoustic.directivity: 90° x 90° axi-symmetrical (coaxial point-source pattern, approx. ±20° at -6 dB)
electroacoustic.components: 1x 12" weather-resistant low-frequency transducer (3" voice coil, bass-reflex loaded) coaxially mounted with 1x 1.4" exit compression driver (3" voice coil, titanium diaphragm)

operating_modes: Active bi-amplification via LA controller presets
3-way operation when paired with an L-Acoustics subwoofer (3W / 3WX presets)

connection.note: Pin 1+/1- carry the loudspeaker signal; multiple cabinets can be looped through the second connector.

physical.dimensions_mm: 540 H x 410 W (front) x 375 D, tapered to approx. 165 mm wide at the rear
physical.cabinet: Baltic birch plywood (18 mm / 30 mm panels, sealed, screwed and rabbeted), Maroon-gray finish
physical.protection_rating_note: No formal IP rating published; the 12" LF driver is specified as weather-resistant for short-term outdoor use under cover.

modes: Floor stage monitor (wedge angle from the cabinet geometry)
Wall or truss mount via U-bracket
Short vertical coupled arrays via coupling bars
rigging_accessories: CPL112XT coupling adapter bars for vertical stacking/arrays
XTLIFTBAR fly bar (5 pick points for tilt: +14, +7, 0, -7, -14 degrees)

usage: Compact 12-inch coaxial enclosure that doubles as a low-profile stage monitor wedge and a stand-mounted FOH/fill box, delivering a coherent point-source 90 x 90 pattern.
Each cabinet is an 8-ohm load needing one amplifier channel; an LA4 drives up to 4 enclosures, so a four-wedge monitor world fits on a single LA4.
Use the MONITOR preset for floor-wedge duty and FRONT/FILL presets for front-of-house or fill applications to tailor the LF tuning.
Extend low-frequency response by pairing with an L-Acoustics subwoofer (e.g. SB15, SB18, SB218, dV-SUB) and switching to the 3W or 3WX three-way presets.
Symmetric 90-degree coverage and the coaxial design make it easy to rotate for horizontal or vertical orientation without changing the pattern.
Legacy archive product: it must be driven through an L-Acoustics LA-series controller/amplifier with the correct XT preset; mixing with current K/Kara/X-series rigs requires preset and gain matching.
source_manual: 112XT Operator's Manual (EN) - L-Acoustics XT LINE (112XT, 115XT, 115XT HiQ)
